## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug` succeeds
- [ ] `./gradlew lint` introduces no new warnings
- [ ] Commits are signed (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the convention in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] No em dashes, no AI vocabulary, no emojis in prose
- [ ] Tests added for new behavior (or explain why not)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing
